title: Management and control
doc_html:
§1063.  Management and control

The management and control of the experiment stations of Louisiana is vested in the board of supervisors of the Louisiana State University and Agricultural and Mechanical College, and shall be exercised by the director of experiment stations of Louisiana subject to the direction and supervision of the board.
doc_text:
§1063.  Management and control
The management and control of the experiment stations of Louisiana is vested in the board of supervisors of the Louisiana State University and Agricultural and Mechanical College, and shall be exercised by the director of experiment stations of Louisiana subject to the direction and supervision of the board.
